verdict_reasoning: SRC is a non-receptor tyrosine kinase canonically inner-leaflet anchored via N-terminal myristoylation and palmitoylation on the cytoplasmic face of the PM — its kinase domain faces the cytosol. However, in oncogenic/cancer-cell contexts, SRC (like other Src-family kinases) has documented ecto-display on the outer leaflet of tumor cells (cancer ecto-kinase phenomenon), qualifying as cell_state_induced surface biology. This places it in contextual rather than no.
